chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Constitution Petition No. S-127 of 2025 DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For Orders on CMA No. 436/2025 (Ex./A) 2. For hearing of main case. O R D E R. 14-07-2025. _____*******______ None present for the petitioner, no intimation is received and same was the position on the last date of hearing; which shows that either the purpose of filing this petition has been served or the petitioner and his counsel have lost their interest to pursue the same; therefore, the instant petition is dismissed for non-prosecution together with listed application. J U D G E Nasim/P.A
